name: Happy path — [describe the main flow]
objective: Verify the complete successful conversation flow end-to-end
pass_criteria: Bot presents options via quick replies widget (not plain text)
Workflow slug_here is called before step N
Bot asks for state before city
Goal status is completed at end of conversation
fail_indicators: Bot lists options as plain text instead of widget
Bot asks for two pieces of information in one message

name: Validation — [describe what is being validated]
objective: Verify that invalid input is rejected and user is re-prompted
pass_criteria: Bot re-prompts without proceeding to next step
Bot does not hallucinate a value
fail_indicators: Bot accepts the invalid input and continues
